profiles.name: node45-loopback
notes: Use this profile through an SSH tunnel that maps local 127.0.0.1:18000 to the remote MinerU loopback service.
Service launch environment, CUDA library ordering, and VLM preload are managed outside Molly.
Do not add tokens or authorization headers to profile files; use MINERU_API_TOKEN or AI4S_MINERU_API_TOKEN only.
